docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BPM LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHERRY, TIMOTHY $74,712.07 PRINCIPAL, $1,248.06 INTEREST, $702.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $76,662.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17243022)

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BPM LLP
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-29-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17242053), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BPM LLP SERVED JUL-11-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUL-15-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT CHERRY, TIMOTHY
